interaction_phrase: launched by the Swiss Federal Council
occurrence_sentence: The SQI, launched by the Swiss Federal Council in May 2022, aims to further strengthen Switzerland's excellent position in quantum science and technology – from fundamental research to industrial application.

interaction_phrase: of the Swiss Academy of Sciences
occurrence_sentence: Part of these efforts includes the mandate for the SQC of the Swiss Academy of Sciences (SCNAT) to define a quantum strategy for Switzerland.

interaction_phrase: SQC strategic recommendations
occurrence_sentence: Building on the SQC strategic recommendations from 20236 and providing further guidance for the more technical sections below, this strategy is anchored in the following principles:

interaction_phrase: the SQI supports meaningful foundations
occurrence_sentence: Hence, as a publicly funded initiative, the SQI supports meaningful foundations e.g. in the form of translational infrastructures and specific support via competitive calls.

interaction_phrase: the SQC is committed to responsible innovation at national and international levels
occurrence_sentence: In light of this fundamental uncertainty and the potentially significant societal impact of emerging quantum applications, the SQC is committed to responsible innovation at national and international levels.

interaction_phrase: by the Swiss Quantum Commission (SQC) as part of the Swiss Quantum Initiative (SQI)
occurrence_sentence: For a periodically updated overview including private organizations visit the Swissnex website.10 by the Swiss Quantum Commission (SQC) as part of the Swiss Quantum Initiative (SQI)

interaction_phrase: Swiss participation in Horizon Europe
occurrence_sentence: Whilst the close ties within Europe, exemplified by the Swiss participation in Horizon Europe, are a salient feature, the field of quantum is an endeavor of global proportions.

interaction_phrase: by Swissnex
occurrence_sentence: For a periodically updated overview including private organizations visit Project Quantum by Swissnex.

interaction_phrase: EU countries
occurrence_sentence: This includes, at its core, EU countries and the countries active in the Multilateral Dialogue on Quantum13 with shared interests and complementary capabilities.

interaction_phrase: SNSF general schemes
occurrence_sentence: Numerous bottom-up initiatives and SNSF general schemes support the international exchange of researchers, including several bilateral memoranda and agreements.

occurrence_sentence: This includes, at its core, EU countries and the countries active in the Multilateral Dialogue on Quantum13 with shared interests and complementary capabilities.

interaction_phrase: funded major NCCRs focused on quantum topics
occurrence_sentence: Since 2001, the Swiss National Science Foundation has funded major NCCRs focused on quantum topics.

interaction_phrase: participating in 11 of the first 21 funded projects during the ramp-up phase 2018–2022
occurrence_sentence: Swiss laboratories have become key players in the European Union's Quantum Flagship, participating in 11 of the first 21 funded projects during the ramp-up phase 2018–2022.

interaction_phrase: Switzerland's strength in quantum research has been built on long-term strategic investments
occurrence_sentence: Switzerland's strength in quantum research has been built on long-term strategic investments.

interaction_phrase: helped build a robust national research infrastructure
occurrence_sentence: Each of these programs, typically spanning over a decade with an overall funding of around CHF 150 million,5 has helped build a robust national research infrastructure and trained a generation of highly skilled quantum scientists.

interaction_phrase: Swiss laboratories have become key players in the European Union's Quantum Flagship
occurrence_sentence: Swiss laboratories have become key players in the European Union's Quantum Flagship, participating in 11 of the first 21 funded projects during the ramp-up phase 2018–2022.

interaction_phrase: Organizations like the Swiss Center for Electronics and Microtechnology (CSEM) and the Paul Scherrer Institute (PSI) host research facilities in combination with translational infrastructures, platforms and test environments
occurrence_sentence: Organizations like the Swiss Center for Electronics and Microtechnology (CSEM) and the Paul Scherrer Institute (PSI) host research facilities in combination with translational infrastructures, platforms and test environments, for example for photonic or superconducting quantum architectures, cryogenic subsystems or quantum sensor technologies.

interaction_phrase: play a key role for the future of quantum in Switzerland
occurrence_sentence: These types of organizations and the infrastructures and platforms they host play a key role for the future of quantum in Switzerland.

interaction_phrase: by the Swiss Quantum Commission (SQC) as part of the Swiss Quantum Initiative (SQI)
occurrence_sentence: by the Swiss Quantum Commission (SQC) as part of the Swiss Quantum Initiative (SQI)

interaction_phrase: international organizations such as the OECD recommend, as a top priority, the establishment of state-supported deep tech funds that are designed for longer-term technology development
occurrence_sentence: In order to systematically address this financing gap in Switzerland, international organizations such as the OECD recommend, as a top priority, the establishment of state-supported deep tech funds that are designed for longer-term technology development.

occurrence_sentence: Maintain the highest level of collaboration with partners in Europe including the integration of Swiss institutions into EU programs like Horizon Europe.

occurrence_sentence: Actively liaise with the EU towards the Quantum Act [29].

interaction_phrase: analysis of SQI calls for ideas
occurrence_sentence: Based on analysis of SQI calls for ideas and of recent project proposals,31 the required investments into quantum-specific translational infrastructures, platforms and shared services are on the order of CHF 200 to 300 million.

interaction_phrase: strategic fit with selected host institutions
occurrence_sentence: The strategic fit with selected host institutions needs to be assured as well as mid- to longer-term operational plans.

interaction_phrase: public-private matching funds
occurrence_sentence: Public-private matching funds (roughly 1:1) provide for a meaningful base, which can stimulate both scientific discoveries and contributions to application innovation pipelines.

occurrence_sentence: Information gathered as part of the various SQI calls for ideas and proposals was also used in deriving strategic directions and recommendations.

interaction_phrase: the SQI 2023/2024 Call for Ideas
occurrence_sentence: Notably, the SQC values the thoughtful contributions from the Swiss quantum community in response to the SQI 2023/2024 Call for Ideas.

interaction_phrase: is hosted by
occurrence_sentence: The Swiss Quantum Initiative (SQI) is the federal quantum initiative to strengthen Switzerland's leading ­p­osition in the field of quantum science and technology. It was launched in 2022 and is hosted by the Swiss Academy of Sciences (SCNAT).

interaction_phrase: involves
occurrence_sentence: The initiative operates under a mandate by the State Secretariat of Education, Research and Innovation (SERI) and its implementation involves three main institutions: the Swiss National Science Foundation, Innosuisse and SCNAT.
